title: fix: spore weekly grant, microbe zero pollen + UI
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Syncing the hive clock
gist.blurb: We've updated the pollen refill schedules. Spore tier now refreshes weekly, keeping the ecosystem balanced and buzzing.
gist.summary: Implemented a weekly refill cadence for Spore accounts and added a dedicated status for accounts under review.
gist.impact: Users will see updated refill timers in the dashboard, ensuring fair resource distribution across the platform.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the robot managing a 'Pollen Distribution Center'. A calendar or clock is prominent, indicating the new weekly cycle. The mood is industrious and organized.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot and a small robot adjusting a large lime green (#ecf874) clock tower mechanism. A digital display shows a weekly schedule. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic. Chunky retro sprites.
